title: Nvidia’s $20 billion Groq deal queried by Warren, Blumenthal

title: White House moves to strip California and other states of AI regulation power
description: The White House is laying out a new framework that it wants Congress to use to shape national rules for artificial intelligence without curbing growth in the sector.
content: The White House said on Friday that Congress should “preempt state AI laws” that it views as too burdensome, laying out a broad framework for how it wants Congress to address concerns about artificial intelligence without curbing growth or innovation... [3510 chars]

title: White House calls on Congress to take light approach to AI rules
description: WASHINGTON — The White House said on Friday that Congress should “preempt state AI laws” that it views as too burdensome, laying out a broad framework for how it wants Congress to address concerns about artificial intelligence without curbing growth or innovation in the sector.

title: AI Revolutionizes Anti-Corruption Investigations in Jammu and Kashmir
description: The Anti-Corruption Bureau in Jammu and Kashmir is poised to integrate artificial intelligence into its operations. A technical appraisal committee has been formed to assess this development under the guidance of the Jammu and Kashmir government. The committee aims to deliver a comprehensive report within 45 days.
